name: energy_ops_agent
description: B2B building energy optimization agent that coordinates weather grounding, utility pricing analysis, comfort-safety conflict resolution, and governed load-shedding actions.

extensions.description: ADK A2A executor extension for improved message and data handling.

skills.name: Extreme Weather Energy Optimization
skills.description: Resolve occupant comfort, safety, and utility peak-demand pricing conflicts using grounded building, weather, pricing, and occupancy data.
examples: Optimize MedTech HQ during the heat dome and peak-demand surge.

skills.name: Energy Simulation Observability
skills.description: Run synthetic rare-event simulations and return trace steps for conflict-resolution debugging.
examples: Run the heat-dome peak-pricing simulation and show the trace.
